features: This walking stick has an anodized aluminium shaft and comfortable contour grip with rubber tip.
The height of the stick adjusts from 32” to 36” in 1” increments.
It can be stored away neatly as it has 4 folding sections that snap out automatically.
Heavy Duty Polybag with Header Card.
description: This walking stick has an anodized aluminium shaft and comfortable contour grip with rubber tip. The height of the stick adjusts from 32” to 36” in 1” increments and it can be stored away neatly as it has 4 folding sections that snap out automatically.
